EmailTemplate.description: Follow up email to Employers Liability claim.
EmailTemplate.name: FNOL to Insured – Employers Liability
EmailTemplate.subject: Information required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
(Use for those who notified us) Thank you for the time on the phone earlier, I am sorry to learn of the claim being made against you.
(Use for those where we received notification) We have received notification of a potential claim being made against you for (insert allegations and claimant here).
As discussed, in order that I can register the claim with insurers, please could you forward me the following:
- Overview of events to date leading up to the claim - The date of when the incident occurred and when the claim was made against you - Description of the injury sustained by your employee - Copy of any contract/emails with your employee - Confirmation of the job your employee was to undertake - Invoice/charge sheet for the work undertaken by your employee - Confirmation of your VAT status
I attach your policy schedule and wording to assist.
Upon receipt of the above, I will send to our insurers for review. Depending on how quickly you return the information will determine the timeframe for this.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
